_comment: Last acknowledged state of the HIP-1056 cutover signals (see docs/MIGRATION.md §6). The watch-cutover workflow compares live state against this file and fails loudly on any change; after reacting, update the field(s) and commit. The *_pr_head and hip_1200_last_commit fields catch in-place revisions (a PR amended or a HIP edited while its open/closed state is unchanged still moves the port's target).
